text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
How's this? What if we pass out<n>boba tea made
with Nambu kettles?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's a... novel... approach, but<n>would it really
help promote Morioka?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Promoting Morioka... They must be<n>talking about
the Traveling Morioka<n>Festival from the other day.
Yukino<n>Bijin said she'd help promote it.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Perfect timing. I was<n>thinking of ways
to promote the<n>fest'val, and I'd love to pick your
brain.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout organiz'n one of those<n>"flash mobs"?
Those are really hip<n>and modern. We'd be the talk
of<n>town!
choice_data_list: It doesn't seem that related to Morioka...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That's true... There's gotta be<n>somethin'
more hip...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Say, what if you just drop the<n>idea of
making the promotion flashy?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why not just tell people what you<n>love about
Morioka straight-up<n>instead of trying to stand out?
choice_data_list: Like how you talked to me at the pop-up shop.
Like how you talked to me at the pop-up shop.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you referr'n to... our talk<n>about sansa
odori?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Some kind of talk steeped in<n>memories, I
presume? That sounds<n>like a good place to start.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: That was someth'n... Speak'n ofwax'n nostalgic... Aha!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When I was in elementary school, I<n>played the
taiko drums for the sansa<n>odori at a local fest'val!
It was<n>strapped to my chest and I'd hit it<n>while I
walked.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Its way hard'r than y'might think!<n>Botch up the
drumm'n, and the dance<n>goes out of whack!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I think I can relate. It's hard not to<n>be nervous
when your actions impact<n>everyone around you.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Exactamundo. So, when I was down<n>in the dumps
one time after mess'n<n>up, my taiko teach'r came
up to me,<n>and... hehehe. Guess what she said?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: She said it's okay to mess up!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
She reminded me that sansa is the<n>same musical
phrase repeat'n over<n>and over as we walk a long
way.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
And that means n'matter how many<n>times
y'mess up, you can always fix<n>it next time. As
long as you had fun<n>and are smil'n when you're
finished...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Then all's well that ends well.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. I dig it. Like, be yourself and<n>don't try to
put on a front. That kind<n>of thing.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah... That's right. Just be myself.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
That's gotta be it! The thing I love<n>about Morioka
is... just being able<n>t'be your plain ol' self and
smile!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now there's a good look for<n>you. Tell the
customers exactly that.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-I see! But how can I get that<n>across?
choice_data_list: Have them experience it for themselves!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Experience it for themselves, huh...<n>Oh, in that
case!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I pass by the dance<n>studio to
see Yukino Bijin practicing<n>the taiko drums while
Gold City<n>dances along.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa! So that was the sound of ataiko drum! ♪ What kind of dance areyou doing? I wanna try too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Golly! If it isn't Curren! Here, lemme<n>show you
the steps!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: One, two, one, two! That's it! You're<n>doin' great!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-all right! If I play the taiko drums<n>just like this on
the day of th'event, I<n>bet I'll bring in cust'mers by
the<n>dozen!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A video?! Right! That way we can<n>promote
Morioka to people all ov'r<n>th'world!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sounds pretty good. Leave the filming<n>to me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all! Welcome to the<n>Trav'lin
Morioka Fest'val! Now,<n>everyone sansa odori!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Gold Ship films Yukino Bijin<n>dancing and
chatting away as natural<n>as can be. A few days
later...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yes, fam! Sansaaaa! Sakkora<n>choiwaaa?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yasseeeee! ☆ That's what's up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The sansa odori is such a cute dance!<n>I've gotta
upload a video of myself<n>dancing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Yukino. I saw your Umatok video!<n>It got a huge
number of views, eh?<n>Thanks to you, the fest'val
looks like<n>it's gonna be a big hit!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank goodn'ss! I'm just glad<n>t'help! Good
luck with the main<n>event! Fing'rs cross'd!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yukino Bijin's dance video is a viral<n>sensation
and, because of that, the<n>Traveling Morioka
Festival ends up a<n>huge success.
